description: Scope — Ink Dissolve, AI ink-in-water with luma gating
code:
// Scope — Ink Dissolve
// AI feed layered through luma gating, like ink dropped in water

scope.prompt('black ink dissolving in clear water, tendrils spreading, organic fluid dynamics, macro photography')
  .noise(0.14)
  .vace(0.95)
  .memory(0.58)
  .step1(980)
  .step2(720)
  .step3(450)

AUDIO.bins = 4; AUDIO.smooth = 0.90; AUDIO.apply();
var low = env(() => a.fft[0] || 0, 0.3, 0.05);
var mid = env(() => a.fft[1] || 0, 0.3, 0.07);

speed = 0.35

const rampMask = () => Math.min(1, time * 0.9)

// Scope NDI — full color, slightly warm
src(s3)
  .color(1.05, 0.95, 0.9)
  .saturate(1.2)
  .out(o1)

// luma-gated bright regions from AI feed
src(s3)
  .luma(0.4, 0.15)
  .color(0.2, 0.1, 0.35)
  .saturate(1.4)
  .out(o2)

// composite — blend AI feed with luma ghost layer + deep feedback
src(o1)
  .add(src(o2), 0.3)
  .modulate(noise(1.0, 0.015), () => 0.012 + mid() * 0.005)
  .modulateRotate(noise(0.7, 0.008), () => 0.003 + low() * 0.001)
  .color(
    () => 0.9 + low() * 0.06,
    () => 0.82 + mid() * 0.04,
    () => 0.95
  )
  .saturate(() => 1.15 + low() * 0.04)
  .blend(src(o0).scale(1.0006).rotate(() => Math.cos(time * 0.018) * 0.0006), () => rampMask() * 0.85)
  .colorama(() => 0.0015 + mid() * 0.0006)
  .brightness(0.005)
  .out(o0)
